# BOOK ARCHITECTURE — Volume V (Great Books)

**Project:** Predictive History, Volume 5: Great Books

## Series and volume

**Series:** Predictive History — nested block `volume_5_great_books` in `book-architecture.yaml`.

**Volume 5:** Great Books (this volume’s lecture corpus).

## Thesis

TBD — set when Volume V Part I book thesis is drafted (lecture-faithful arc; see book/VOLUME-V-GREAT-BOOKS.md).

## Book promise

Part I follows Jiang's Great Books lectures in classroom order, transcript-backed (`lectures/great-books-*.md`, registry `gb-*` in `metadata/sources.yaml`). Each Part I chapter ends with a Divergence box by default (Part II method operator-locked — see book/VOLUME-V-GREAT-BOOKS.md).

## Audience

- **Primary:** serious general readers interested in history, philosophy, literature, and consciousness
- **Secondary:** readers following the Great Books classroom series on @PredictiveHistory

## End-of-chapter divergence (Part I)

- **Registry:** `divergence-tracking/registry/divergences.jsonl`

End each Part I chapter with a boxed subsection per CHAPTER-DIVERGENCE-BOX.md — divergence IDs from divergences.jsonl where linked; not chapter_end_predictions (Volume I only) unless Part II policy adopts prediction adjudication.


## Part II (after Part I)

### Part II — method TBD (Great Books)

**Begins after:** `gb-ch09`

Operator locks evaluation mode in book/VOLUME-V-GREAT-BOOKS.md (divergence-first default for Part I boxes).
